scripts.install:all: npm --prefix rev-proxy install && npm --prefix login install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix api install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,login,frontend,proxy "npm --prefix api run dev" "npm --prefix login run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix rev-proxy run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix api run build && npm --prefix login run build && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix rev-proxy run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,login,frontend,proxy "npm --prefix api start" "npm --prefix login start" "npm --prefix frontend start" "npm --prefix rev-proxy start"
scripts.test: npm --prefix api test && npm --prefix rev-proxy test
scripts.check: npm --prefix api run typecheck && npm --prefix rev-proxy run typecheck && npm --prefix login run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
